The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
Star Atlas Chatter #7 – The LETTER & SAGE Labs – Week in Review 7/23 – 7/29 2023
RahMega posted a video recapping the past week of Star Atlas news.
Star Atlas Dogfight 2 0 with the Boys
Beyond the Horizon posted a video using the dogfight trainer in the Star Atlas Showroom.
Star Atlas Core Episode 4 Dramatized Reading
OCG Thor posted a video reading episode 4 of the Star Atlas comic.
Metaverse Nomads #105 ATMTA Major Operations Change
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of their Star Atlas live stream.
Star Atlas Chatter #7 — “The Letter” & SAGE Labs
RahMega published an article recapping the past week of Star Atlas news.
Star Atlas Runway and Company Financial UPDATE!
The Hologram News Network posted a video updating the Star Atlas runway.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #90
Aephia published their latest Star Atlas newsletter.
The Atlas Brew #73
Star Atlas TV posted a video replay of the Atlas Brew #73.
Star Atlas Brew #73 REMIX Recap!
Beyond The Horizon posted a video remixing the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas Calico Compakt Hero OUT FOR A RIP!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video trying out the Calico Compakt Hero in the Star Atlas Showroom.
